name: Shamamon

signature_move.name: Shama Hammer
signature_move.description: Strikes the enemy's head with the large club it uses for its rituals.

description: A Goburimon whose duty is to listen to the will of God , and convey that to its clan. It performs a mysterious dance during its rituals, and it is said that once it gets fired up to the maximum, it becomes able to hear the prophecies of God. It also makes use of this ritual to predict matters that are of importance to its clan. Its Special Move is striking the enemy's head with the large club it uses for its rituals ( Shama Hammer ).
